text: Right now, I am standing at our booth.
My colleague is presenting on the stage.
Two partners are waiting for me.
Hi Flavia! It's Tom, from the office. What is happening at the fair right now?
Hi Tom! I am standing at our booth right now. It is very busy!
Wonderful! I am reading your report here at the office. What are the other people doing?
My colleague is presenting on the stage, and two partners are waiting to talk to us.
Great. Are you preparing for your speech?
Yes, I am preparing now. The audience is arriving, and I am ready!
Two partners are waiting for us.
I am preparing for my speech right now.

Hi Flavia, it's Nina. I am calling from the main hall. Right now, the fair is very busy. People are visiting the booths, and a speaker is presenting a new project on the stage. Two partners are waiting at our booth to meet you. I am preparing the table now, and the audience is arriving. Please come quickly, because everyone is waiting for you!

Good afternoon, everyone, and welcome to the International Small Business Fair. The event is starting now. On the main stage, a speaker is presenting a new project. In Hall B, three companies are showing their products, and many visitors are taking photos. Our team is waiting at booth twelve to meet you. Right now, coffee is available near the entrance. We are opening the doors, so please come in. Enjoy the fair!

It is nine o'clock, and the fair is opening now. First, the visitors are arriving at the entrance. Then the companies are opening their booths. On the main stage, a speaker is starting a speech. At our booth, my colleague is preparing the table. Right now, two partners are waiting to meet us.
Right now, I am waiting at the booth.
My colleague is presenting on the stage.
Two partners are waiting for us.
I am preparing for my speech.
We are working hard right now.
Right now, I am standing at our booth.
I am preparing for my speech right now.
